reasoning_content: We need to check if 7897 is prime. First, note it's odd, not divisible by 2. Sum of digits: 7+8+9+7=31, not divisible by 3, so not divisible by 3. Last digit not 0 or 5, so not divisible by 5. Check divisibility by 7: 7*1128=7896, remainder 1, so not divisible by 7. By 11: alternating sum: 7-8+9-7=1, not divisible by 11. By 13: 13*607=7891, remainder 6; 13*608=7904 too high. Not divisible. By 17: 17*464=7888, remainder 9; 17*465=7905, no. By 19: 19*415=7885, remainder 12; 19*416=7904, no. By 23: 23*343=7889, remainder 8; 23*344=7912, no. By 29: 29*272=7888, remainder 9; 29*273=7917, no. By 31: 31*254=7874, remainder 23; 31*255=7905, no. By 37: 37*213=7881, remainder 16; 37*214=7918, no. By 41: 41*192=7872, remainder 25; 41*193=7913, no. By 43: 43*183=7869, remainder 28; 43*184=7912, no. By 47: 47*168=7896, remainder 1; so not divisible. By 53: 53*149=7897? 53*149 = 53*150 - 53 = 7950 - 53 = 7897 exactly! So 7897 = 53 * 149. Hence composite. So not prime. Quick sanity check: 53*149 = 53*100=5300, 53*49=2597, sum 7897, yes. So answer: not prime.
